name: TRINITY
subtitle: The Void Three
description: Smurjan's domain. A realm containing itself three times, overlaid. Bali-reality (kind) + Kali-reality (wrathful) + Fused-reality (judgment). Entry must be attempted three times in rapid succession to meet Fused-Smurjan.
gate: The Three Doors (all three opened simultaneously)

life.phenomenon: Every building has THREE entrances. One to Bali's world, one to Kali's, one to the Fused-world. You pick which mood you're in. Walk through the wrong one and the building itself rejects you.
life.inhabitants: Bali-Hermits (kind, always offering tea). Kali-Warriors (righteous, always armed). Fused-Judges (silent, always watching). All three populations are the SAME PEOPLE — they just live in different overlays.

fauna.name: Three-Headed Hound
fauna.note: One head per reality. They argue. The middle head wins when hungry.

fauna.name: Judgment Moth
fauna.note: Lands on you ONLY if you have been lying recently. Their count on you is your sin-total.

fauna.name: Jade Snake
fauna.note: Speaks with three voices simultaneously. They recite the day's weather in all three realities. Useful for travelers.

flora.name: Triune Rose
flora.note: One plant. Three different-colored blooms. Blue for Bali, orange for Kali, white for Fused. Cut one and the other two wilt.

flora.name: Shadow Bamboo
flora.note: Grows in all three realities at once. Cutting it in one reality leaves the cut visible only to you.

life.architecture: Every building has three doors. Walls painted in three stripes (blue/purple/orange). Rooftops split in thirds. Staircases spiral three times before reaching a new floor.
life.culture: Decisions made by voting with yourself THREE TIMES — even if alone. 'Do I want coffee? One says yes, one says no, one says tea. Tea wins.' This is called the Trinity Vote.
life.signature_item: Triune Coin — always lands on all three sides simultaneously. Flip it to break deadlocks. The coin cannot be fooled.

sensory.sound: Three layers of ambient — birdsong (Bali) + wind (Fused) + crackling fire (Kali) — blended. You can focus on any one layer.
sensory.smell: Flowers + rain + burnt wood. All three. Always.
sensory.feel: A constant slight déjà vu. The realm knows you better than you know yourself.

<g transform='translate(1080 450)' opacity='0.75'><rect x='-60' y='-100' width='120' height='200' rx='8' fill='#301408' stroke='#ffa060' stroke-width='2'/><circle cx='30' cy='0' r='4' fill='#ffa060'/><text y='130' text-anchor='middle' fill='#ffc080' font-size='12' letter-spacing='3'>KALI DOOR</text><text y='146' text-anchor='middle' fill='#ffc080' font-size='9' letter-spacing='2' opacity='0.6'>(wrath)</text></g>

cities.name: The Hall of Kindness
cities.note: A hall of a thousand windows, each looking at a different person being kind to a stranger.
cities.lore: Bali-Smurjan walks here slowly. Every window is a blessing already given. The hall extends forever in all directions.

cities.name: The Garden of the Small Good
cities.note: Flowers bloom when someone helps an elderly stranger across a street.
cities.lore: On busy days the garden is bright. On tragic days it is also bright — more people help than you think.

cities.name: The Pyre of Just Wrath
cities.note: A city-shaped bonfire. The flames are justified.
cities.lore: Kali-Smurjan tends the fire. Every flame is a wrath that was deserved. The fire does not grow beyond its proper size.

cities.name: The Forge of Vengeance
cities.note: Kali forges swords here. None are used; the forging is the point.
cities.lore: Each sword represents a wrong still uncorrected in some realm. Kali keeps them hanging. When a wrong is corrected somewhere, a sword turns to rust here and falls.

cities.name: The Seat of Judgment
cities.note: Only reachable by entering all three doors simultaneously.
cities.lore: Fused-Smurjan sits here with three voices. When you are judged, Bali argues for mercy, Kali argues for justice, Fused decides. The three agree more often than you'd think.

cities.name: The Library of Decided Things
cities.note: Every judgment ever made on any soul is written here, unalterable.
cities.lore: You may read your own file. No one else's. If you cannot find yours, it means you have not yet been judged. Keep living.

sacred_sites.name: The Three-Footed Bridge
sacred_sites.note: The only way between the three realities.
sacred_sites.lore: A bridge that exists in all three realities simultaneously. Walking it feels normal. Leaving it feels like being decided about.
